metadata.description: Meaningfy company-wide skills, agents, methodologies, and engineering standards for working with LLM agents consistently

plugins.name: meaningfy-engineering
plugins.description: Engineering standards: new-repo scaffolding (project-setup), clean layered Python (cosmic-python), system architecture, and Meaningfy git/PR workflow

plugins.name: meaningfy-ai-coding
plugins.description: Documentation-first AI-assisted development helpers: clarity gate, EPIC planning, BDD, code-review checklist, and technical writing (pairs with the external stream-coding + superpowers skills — see docs/environment-setup.md)

plugins.name: meaningfy-consulting
plugins.description: Semantic-technologies consulting coaching and executive communication (Governing Thought, SCQA, Minto, MECE)
